info.english_meaning: to sound to be ill to irritate to trouble
info.hindI_arTa: Sabda karanA rogI honA duHKa denA satAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samIM reBAso asvarannindraM somasya pItaye' (f0 88311) samasvaran aSabdayan AkArayan
'yadA vA fcamApnotyomityevAti svarati' (CAM0 u0 144) atiSayena svarati SabdaM karoti uccArayati
'iha tyA saDamAdyA… harI indra pratadvasU aBi svara' (f0 81327) aBisvara asmAn pratyAgacCeti durgo niruktavfttO
